name: atv-paperboard
description: All The Vibes — atv-paperboard plugin for GitHub Copilot CLI. Cross-harness HTML artifact toolkit.

plugins.name: atv-paperboard
plugins.description: Beautify LLM-generated data artifacts into linted HTML triples. Hooks postToolUse to detect status tables and suggest `paperboard render`. Ships an artifact-reviewer agent and skills. Fail-open: never blocks tool execution. Requires `pip install atv-paperboard` (Python 3.10+).
